pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh script which initializes TASK_ORK to this path.
Verified via verifier.py and export_result.sh which expect the final ORK file at this path.
Verified via verifier.py and export_result.sh which check for the report file here.
Verified via verifier.py which evaluates the 'windaverage' in simulation conditions against this threshold.
Verified via verifier.py which checks if 'maxaltitude' >= 300.0.
Verified via verifier.py scoring logic and default metadata parsing.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on an official OpenRocket example model ('simple_model_rocket.ork', originally designed by Sampo Niskanen) which is copied to the starting path. It requires the agent to optimize parachute deployment to achieve specific simulation targets. The verification scripts correctly match all metadata claims, expecting a target wind of 10.0 m/s, apogee >= 300 m, ground hit velocity <= 6.0 m/s, and drift <= 150 m. The exported file locations are also confirmed by the setup, export, and verifier scripts.
